rules: Use this v2 catalog as active Part 0 library.
Chrome slices use uniform border thickness/brightness and rounded shape-following state fills.
Use nine_slice_margin for variable-size Slate/UMG box brushes.
Runtime labels, scores, names, values, portraits, avatars, and live data are not baked into chrome.
Icons are the specific main-menu set requested; do not use generic v1 lock/backpack/coin/map replacements.
Do not create visual chrome or decorative art with C++/Slate primitive drawing; use locked bitmap assets from this library.
